message:
Command `# The _env.tcl files have 11 occurrences of 8afc8346! These need to be patched too.
# Let's count how many _env.tcl files have old paths
RUN_V3="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3"

grep -rl "8afc8346" "$RUN_V3" 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "files with 8afc8346"
grep -rl "v1.6.0" "$RUN_V3" 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "files with v1.6.0"` executed with exit code 0.
